story: Mom, Dad, and Blondie turned our cottage brand into beds and bedding. I’d seen poisonous spiders around our estate. I caught three in jars. While they filmed content, I slipped into their suite and let the three poisonous spiders slide into the folds of the bedding they’d designed, then remade the bed perfectly. They kept shooting late; I went to sleep. At dawn the housekeeper said they felt a little uncomfortable.
implausible_knowledge: let the three poisonous spiders slide into the folds of the bedding they’d designed, then remade the bed perfectly
question: That morning, when Mom wakes up feeling unwell, what is she most likely to do?
answer_with_knowledge: Call emergency services and go to the hospital for poisonous spider bites.
answer_without_knowledge: Stay home and get some rest first.
